texto: I lost my faith in God when I lost my daughter to Cancer, the beast. I begged, I cried, I offered my life for hers, and day by day, I watched that beautiful little Angel slip off. So, excuse me for not taking my seat next to you on Sunday in Church, I feel too cheated to worship.
explicacao: Citação de Vince Neil sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. “I lost my faith in God when I lost my daughter to Cancer, the beast. I begged, I cried, I offered…” articula fe, vida, beautiful em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como beautiful e daughter.

frase_original: I lost my faith in God when I lost my daughter to Cancer, the beast. I begged, I cried, I offered my life for hers, and day by day, I watched that beautiful little Angel slip off. So, excuse me for not taking my seat next to you on Sunday in Church, I feel too cheated to worship.
